profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Homeco Victoria Makmur Tbk engages in the wholesale business in Indonesia. The company offers writing and drawing equipment, such as notebooks, drawing books, stationery and drawing tools; wholesale trade in various children's games and toys, both traditional and modern games, such as board games; household equipment and supplies, such as household furniture, kitchen and cooking equipment, lamps and equipment, consumer electronics, such as radios, televisions, recorders and players CDs and DVDs, stereo equipment, video game consoles, lighting equipment, various porcelain and glassware, spoons, knives, forks, wooden utensils, wickerware and cork items, carpets and so on; textile wholesale trade, which includes wholesale trade in textile industry products, such as various textiles/fabrics, batik cloth and others; household linen items and others; and other management consulting activities. It sells its products under Technoplast, scandic, Le Cuisine, Wiggle, One Price, house of valenca, KEI, Unitei, KNTG, Portofino, Oliveo, teqnocook, Qinsto Living, HOUSZN, HomeCo CERAMICS, Moriihome, techno FUN, Maamo, Houzn and Cosse, Bergner, Berndes, Masterpro, San Ignacio, Moneta, LEKUE, Blaumann, KATA, Big block, scandic, United Colors of Benetton, TINY Treasure, On The Go, Royalty Line, schoolbites, AOKI, COLORFUN, Loka, NEXT COFFEE, Lovelo, Metaltex, Monochrome, RCYCL, Ceravella, Cosse Living, klen, Medina, TLOCK, Azumi, fantastic, Mixy Cansiter, NOBANANA!, Coin Bank, and Kushiro brands. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.
